title: Totemik
description: Automatically disconnects you from the server when you run out of totems
body:
# 🪄 Totemic

**Totemik** – While others are dying shouting "**Totems are over!**", you have already left the server, sipping tea and reading the logs.

---

## 🧠 What does the mod do?

When you run out of totems, **Totemik** takes the initiative – and **automatically leaves the server** before you're turned into pixel soup.

---

## 💡 Why?

* Protection from overly evil players
* Just cool.

---

## 🧪 Compatibility

* ✅ Minecraft `1.21.x`
* ✅ Fabric Loader `>=0.16.14`
* ✅ Java `21`
* ✅ Fabric API

---

## 🛠 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Drop `totemik.jar` into the `mods` folder
3. Launch and don't die 😎

![Boom](https://i.imgur.com/ocT2S6L.gif) ![bam](https://i.imgur.com/re4gNC4.gif)

---

## ⚠️ Recommended setup

> 💡 Totemik only triggers **when your last totem is in your hand**.
> If it's still in your inventory – you're toast.
>
> That's why it's **strongly recommended to use Totemik with an auto totem mod** (like AutoTotem) for full protection.

---

## 🧙 Author

Created with 💀 by [Fristikon](https://github.com/Frist6361)
